name: Screencast with Corner Cam + Particle-Burst Captions
description: A screen recording fills the entire 1080x1920 vertical frame while the presenter's talking-head face rides along as a small circular corner-cam in the upper-left. The corner-cam stays on screen the whole clip — even while full-screen B-roll plays — so the presenter is always visible. Kinetic particle-burst Thai captions over a lower-third scrim. Built for vertical / phone-screen / app-demo screencasts.

layout.background: fallback bg.png (rarely visible — the screen recording covers it)
layout.screen: top_visual_master.mp4 full-screen, object-fit cover, gentle inner zoom 1.0 -> 1.04 — best for vertical / phone-screen content
layout.cornerCam: bottom_visual_master.mp4 (the face) as a circular 408px PiP, upper-left at left 56 / top 84, 5px gold gradient border + drop shadow; pops in at the start, then holds steady on top for the whole clip
layout.broll: full-screen 1080x1920 inserts, object-fit cover — they replace the screen but sit BELOW the corner-cam, so the presenter stays visible
layout.captionPosition: lower third, subtitle-cue top 1490px, over a 760px caption scrim

captions.goldTokenRules: numbers, monetary figures, durations, brand/tech names, headline terms

audio.polishChain: highpass80, lowpass12k, afftdn, agate, acompressor, loudnorm 2-pass, alimiter, apad

broll.aiGenNote: Template 06 B-roll fills the whole frame under the corner-cam — generate clips at aspect_ratio 9:16, resolution 720p, generate_audio false.

sfx.pacing: ~1 SFX per 12s of final video; fewer for clips under 60s
sfx.note: Every clip gets SFX but kept sparse — at most 5, each context-matched to the beat it lands on (whoosh on transitions, ding on CTA, punch on punchlines, riser before reveals). mix-sfx.py enforces the rule and writes output/finals/final.mp4.

label.th: ตัดช่วงเงียบ (dead air)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 6 (Silero VAD); Step 7 ใช้แค่ rough EDL — คงจังหวะพูดเดิมไว้

label.th: ปรับแต่งเสียงพูด (polish)

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 8 — ใช้เสียงดิบจาก visual master; Step 9 re-transcribe ใช้เสียงดิบแทน

label.th: ซับ / คำบรรยายไทย

features.whenOff: ข้าม Step 9-11 ส่วน caption (re-transcribe, post-process subagent, build-*-captions.py); ไม่ mount caption track
ข้าม generate-broll + add-broll.py — ไม่มีภาพแทรก

label.th: จำนวนสูงสุด
เพลงประกอบ (BGM)

features.whenOff: mix-sfx.py ข้าม BGM — final.mp4 = speech (+ SFX) เท่านั้น

label.th: ระดับเสียง
เอฟเฟกต์เสียง (SFX)

features.whenOff: sfx-plan.json มี sfx: [] ว่าง — ไม่มีเอฟเฟกต์เสียง
ข้าม Step 16 — ส่งมอบ output/finals/final.mp4 โดยไม่ฝัง cover art

label.th: บรรทัดบน (ขาว)
บรรทัดเด่น (ทอง)
บรรทัดล่าง (ฟ้า)

pipeline.sourceMedia: TWO source videos like Template 01/05 — top.mp4 (screen recording) + bottom.mp4 (face, master audio). V88_PLAYBOOK Step 7 trims both in parallel with the same EDL (lip-sync lock).
pipeline.differenceFromTemplate01: Template 01 splits the frame 50/50 (screen in a framed top half, face in a bottom circle). Template 06 makes the screen FULL-SCREEN and shrinks the face to a small circular corner-cam — the screen is the hero. Use T01 for 16:9 desktop captures (shown at native aspect); use T06 for vertical / phone-screen content shown full-bleed.
pipeline.step11: python3 scripts/set-duration.py <DURATION> && python3 scripts/build-burst-captions.py && python3 scripts/add-broll.py <starts...>
